mapper.select: /*EventCodeMapper.selectEventCodeRateListByEcpSeq*/ SELECT REL.RATE_CD, MST.RATE_NM FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_RATE_REL REL, MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP MST WHERE REL.RATE_CD = MST.RATE_CD AND REL.ECP_SEQ = #{ecpSeq} AND REL.DEL_YN = 'N'

/*EventCodeMapper.selectEventCodePrmtListByEcpSeq*/ SELECT REL.SEQ, REL.PRMT_ID, PRMT.PRMT_NM, REL.GIFT_TEXT, REL.MAIN_PRDT_ID, REL.GIFT_PRICE / 10000 AS GIFT_PRICE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REL.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_PRMT_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REL.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'HH24') AS PSTNG_PRMT_START_HOUR, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REL.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_PRMT_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REL.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'HH24') AS PSTNG_PRMT_END_HOUR FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_PRMT_REL REL, MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP PRMT WHERE REL.PRMT_ID = PRMT.PRMT_ID AND REL.ECP_SEQ = #{ecpSeq} AND REL.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REL.INDC_ODRG

/*EventCodeMapper.selectRateEventCodePrmtMstXmlList*/ SELECT ECP_SEQ, EVNT_CD, EVNT_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE, USE_YN, RECO_USE_YN, EXPOSED_TEXT FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_MST WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/*EventCodeMapper.selectRateEventCodePrmtXmlList*/ SELECT A.ECP_SEQ , A.EVNT_CD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , B.PRMT_ID , B.GIFT_TEXT , B.MAIN_PRDT_ID , (SELECT PRDT_NM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = B.MAIN_PRDT_ID) AS MAIN_PRDT_NM , (SELECT WEB_URL FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_ID = B.MAIN_PRDT_ID) AS MAIN_PRDT_IMG_URL , B.GIFT_PRICE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE_PRMT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE_PRMT , A.EXPOSED_TEXT FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_MST A, NMCP_EVENT_CODE_PRMT_REL B WHERE A.ECP_SEQ = B.ECP_SEQ(+) AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.DEL_YN(+) = 'N' ORDER BY A.ECP_SEQ, B.INDC_ODRG

/*EventCodeMapper.selectEventPrmtPrdtList*/ SELECT REL.SEQ, REL.PRMT_ID, PRDTREL.PRDT_ID, CASE WHEN PRDTREL.PRDT_ID = REL.MAIN_PRDT_ID THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END PRDT_MAIN_YN, PRDT.PRDT_NM, PRDT.USE_YN AS PRDT_USE_YN, PRDT.WEB_URL AS PRDT_WEB_URL FROM NMCP_EVENT_CODE_PRMT_REL REL, MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRDTREL, MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP PRDT WHERE REL.PRMT_ID = PRDTREL.PRMT_ID AND PRDTREL.PRDT_ID = PRDT.PRDT_ID AND REL.ECP_SEQ = #{ecpSeq} AND REL.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REL.INDC_ODRG
